name: mbrain
description: Personal knowledge brain with hybrid RAG search

skills.name: ingest
skills.description: Ingest meetings, docs, articles into the brain

skills.name: query
skills.description: Answer questions using 3-layer search and synthesis

skills.name: codemap-ingest
skills.description: Build system pages and codemap-backed technical concept maps

skills.name: maintain
skills.description: Brain health checks: contradictions, stale info, orphans

skills.name: enrich
skills.description: Enrich pages from external APIs (Crustdata, Happenstance, Exa)

skills.name: briefing
skills.description: Compile daily briefing with meeting context and active deals

skills.name: migrate
skills.description: Universal migration from Obsidian, Notion, Logseq, markdown, CSV, JSON, Roam

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Set up MBrain: auto-provision Supabase, AGENTS.md injection, first import

skills.name: publish
skills.description: Share brain pages as beautiful password-protected HTML (code + skill pair, zero LLM calls)

setup.description: Auto-provision Supabase and configure MBrain (< 2 min)
